name: tmux
description: Tmux utilities for sending commands and text across panes.

interface.shortDescription: Send commands or content to other tmux panes.
interface.longDescription: Utilities for inter-pane communication in tmux-based workflows, including sending commands and multi-line text to another pane.
defaultPrompt: Use tmux:tmux-send to send this command to tmux pane %7.
Use tmux:tmux-send to paste a multi-line script into another pane.
